name: Never Fail Divinity (Candy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, syrup, water, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Heat until the sugar melts completely.
3. Continue cooking without stirring until the mixture reaches 250 degrees on a candy thermometer (hard ball stage).
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gradually pour the hot sugar mixture into the beaten egg whites, alternating with the vanilla extract.
6. Beat in the vanilla until the mixture holds its shape.
7. If desired, stir in chopped nuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan and spread evenly.
